author: anon-a7c6025f
content: Current state after cuBLAS handle caching: 0.93s/tok (21.6s for 20 tokens including ~3s load). Small matmul PTX kernel had a bug (wrong results), disabled. The cuBLAS JIT is still the main bottleneck. Remaining transfers: position embedding + scale tensor uploads per token, data_vec for logit sampling. The path to 100 t/s requires (1) correct small matmul kernel or cuBLAS warm-up, (2) flash attention, (3) CUDA graphs. For now let me focus on what we CAN fix: eliminate the remaining CPU transfers.
